# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

# YAML file specifying CloudFormation stack creation that creates a new AWS vpc with public & private subnets, including basic routing/internet gateway setup for our three tier application 
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09' # Define the version of YAML syntax being used by CloudFormation (in this case latest official or current)  
Transform: AWS::Serverless-2016-10-31       # Enable Serverless Migration from Lambda and API Gateway to SAM.  Note that these features only make sense in a CFN version up till serverless framework v4 for lwc setup   
Resources :                               
# Define the VPC  
  MyVPC:                                     
      Type: AWS::EC2::VPC ::  # Inherit EC2 resource type, and specify custom name.          
          CidrBlock : '10.0.0.0/16'     # Set default subnet to Public Subnets (cidr block set)   for all our three tier application   
      AvailabilityZone: AZs                 — [availability-zone]              -- List of AWS zone names where your VPC will be provisioned. For example, "us-west-2a" and others     # Ensure we're only in a single region for simplicity        
   PublicSubnets :                            
       Type: AWS::EC2 :: Subnet ::   
          CidrBlock — '10.0.1.0/24',      -- Define public subet with cidr block of "Public_IPv6" set for each availability zone and the region you want to support     # Use Availability Zones if we have multiple regions  
          VpcId, — ${self:Ref}           # Assign reference on vpc id from parent resource   
       Tags :                                  
            - Key: Name                        -- Set default tag name for our public subnet to "Public"            
              Value: Public                    
        
   PrivateSubnets :                            
      Type — AWS::EC2 :: Subnet     # Define private subet in the same way as 'public_subenbts' but change cidr block and assign it under AvailabilityZone.    - VpcId, ${self:Ref}       -- Assign reference on vpc id from parent resource  
      Tags :                                  
           — Key: Name                       # Set default tag name for our private subnet to "Private"    
             Value: Private                
# Define Internet Gateway & Attach it with public and私有subnets    - (this part is optional, we can keep this step empty if there's no need)   — {self.ref} #Ref refers from parent resource which contains VPC id      Type : AWS::EC2 :: InternetGateway    
#       AttachTo: PublicSubnets          -- Refers to public subnet, here we can have multiple internet gateways if required for different tiers (like api gateway etc.)   — {self.ref} #Ref refers from parent resource which contains VPC id        Tags :            - Key : Name           Value : InternetGateway
